goal: Close v6.9.0 only after readiness, governance, release-state, command-surface, full test, and smoke evidence are green.
risk: A release can be tagged because files exist even when the new readiness gate is not actually enforced by release-state audit.
loss_boundary: Do not claim v6.9 release-ready unless work-readiness-audit and release-state-audit both include the new gate and pass.
evidence_plan: readiness audit, release-state audit, governance audits, focused tests, npm test, smoke
stop_conditions: stop if any governance audit fails
stop if package, manifest, organization, or docs disagree on v6.9.0
